nasb.text: “Depart! Unclean!” they cried of themselves. “Depart, depart, do not touch!” So they fled and wandered; Men among the nations said, “They shall not continue to dwell with us.”

esv.text: “Away! Unclean!” people cried at them. “Away! Away! Do not touch!” So they became fugitives and wanderers; people said among the nations, “They shall stay with us no longer.”

cnv.text: 有人向他們喊叫：“走開！你們不潔的人；走開！走開！不要觸摸我。” 他們到處逃亡飄流的時候，列國的人就說：“他們再不能在這裡寄居。”

ccb.text: 人们向他们喊道： “走开！你们是不洁的！ 走开！走开！不要靠近我们。” 于是他们逃亡、流荡， 列国的人说： “他们不可住在我们这里。”
